channel.title: Kennebec County Registry of Deeds
channel.description: No dedicated registry news/RSS feed exists; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official registry page. Minimal static page; monitors sidebar contact/hours content and sitewide notification banner.

item.title: Page updated: Kennebec County Registry of Deeds
item.description:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Removed: - County offices will be closed Friday, July 3 - rd - in observance of Independence Day
